title: lycopodium obtusum
intro: Lycopodium obtusum, also known as the club moss, is a type of vascular plant that belongs to the lycopodiopsida class. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Lycopodium obtusum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and treat skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Lycopodium obtusum is typically prepared as a tincture, tea, or powder, and can be used internally or topically to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
